title: Living Your Full Identity and Self
script:
Find a comfortable position where you can relax completely... perhaps sitting in a chair with your feet flat on the floor and your hands resting comfortably on your thighs, or lying down in a way that supports your entire body... <break time="2s"/> As you settle into this position, you can begin to notice your breathing... naturally and easily... allowing each breath to help you relax more deeply... <break time="1s"/> and as you breathe in, you might notice how your chest rises gently... <break time="1s"/> and as you breathe out, you can feel your shoulders beginning to soften... <break time="2s"/>

That's right... with each breath, you can feel yourself beginning to let go... <break time="1s"/> letting go of any tension you've been carrying... <break time="1s"/> particularly in those shoulders and chest... <break time="1s"/> because your unconscious mind knows exactly how to release what no longer serves you... <break time="2s"/>

And as you continue to breathe naturally and easily, you might begin to notice how your eyelids are becoming heavier... <break time="1s"/> and it's perfectly okay to let them close when they're ready... <break time="1s"/> or to keep them softly focused if that feels right... <break time="1s"/> because your unconscious mind is listening... <break time="1s"/> and it knows exactly what you need... <break time="2s"/>

Now, as you continue to relax more and more deeply, I'd like you to imagine yourself standing at the top of a beautiful staircase... <break time="1s"/> This staircase has ten comfortable steps leading down... <break time="1s"/> and with each step you take, you'll find yourself going deeper and deeper into a state of profound relaxation and inner knowing... <break time="2s"/>

Ten... taking that first step down... feeling yourself beginning to descend into this deeper state of awareness... <break time="1s"/> Nine... stepping down further... noticing how each step allows you to let go even more... <break time="1s"/> Eight... deeper and deeper... your body becoming more and more relaxed... <break time="1s"/> Seven... that's right... feeling the tension in your shoulders and chest beginning to dissolve... <break time="2s"/>

Six... going deeper... into that place where change happens naturally and easily... <break time="1s"/> Five... halfway down now... feeling so comfortable and safe... <break time="1s"/> Four... deeper still... your unconscious mind opening to new possibilities... <break time="1s"/> Three... almost there... feeling completely at peace... <break time="1s"/> Two... very deep now... ready to connect with your truest self... <break time="1s"/> And One... stepping into that beautiful place of deep inner knowing... <break time="3s"/>

Here in this peaceful place, you can sense something wonderful... <break time="1s"/> because you already know who you are... <break time="1s"/> You've discovered that confident person who lives authentically... <break time="1s"/> the one who no longer needs to negotiate with old decisions... <break time="2s"/>

As you rest here in this deep state of knowing, imagine now that you can see yourself as you truly are... <break time="1s"/> living your full identity and self... <break time="1s"/> Notice how this version of you stands... <break time="1s"/> with shoulders relaxed and open... <break time="1s"/> chest expanded with natural confidence... <break time="1s"/> breathing easily and freely... <break time="2s"/>

This is the you who no longer carries the weight of past negotiations... <break time="1s"/> because you understand something profound now... <break time="1s"/> Those old decisions were made by someone who was learning... <break time="1s"/> someone who was growing into who you are today... <break time="1s"/> and that's perfectly okay... <break time="2s"/>

You can appreciate that earlier version of yourself... <break time="1s"/> for doing the best they could with what they knew then... <break time="1s"/> and you can release any need to justify or defend those choices... <break time="1s"/> because you are not those decisions... <break time="1s"/> You are so much more than that... <break time="2s"/>

Feel now how your shoulders naturally drop... <break time="1s"/> as you let go of carrying the burden of who you used to think you had to be... <break time="1s"/> Feel your chest opening... <break time="1s"/> expanding with the freedom to be exactly who you are... <break time="1s"/> in this moment... <break time="1s"/> and in every moment... <break time="3s"/>

There's a beautiful metaphor that your unconscious mind understands perfectly... <break time="1s"/> Imagine a butterfly that has spent time in its cocoon... <break time="1s"/> During that time in the cocoon, the butterfly wasn't wrong... <break time="1s"/> it was exactly where it needed to be... <break time="1s"/> preparing... <break time="1s"/> transforming... <break time="1s"/> becoming... <break time="2s"/>

And when the time came to emerge... <break time="1s"/> the butterfly didn't need to negotiate with its caterpillar self... <break time="1s"/> It simply spread its wings... <break time="1s"/> and flew... <break time="1s"/> carrying with it all the strength it had gained... <break time="1s"/> but free to soar as its true self... <break time="3s"/>

You are like that butterfly now... <break time="1s"/> You have emerged... <break time="1s"/> You know who you are... <break time="1s"/> You are confident in your identity... <break time="1s"/> And you can simply spread your wings... <break time="1s"/> and be... <break time="2s"/>

No more negotiation required... <break time="1s"/> No more tension in your shoulders from carrying old stories... <break time="1s"/> No more tightness in your chest from holding back your truth... <break time="1s"/> Just the natural, easy confidence of someone who knows exactly who they are... <break time="1s"/> and lives from that knowing... <break time="3s"/>

Now, let's anchor this feeling deep into your being... <break time="1s"/> Take a deep breath and feel that confidence filling every cell of your body... <break time="1s"/> Feel your shoulders wide and relaxed... <break time="1s"/> your chest open and free... <break time="1s"/> This is your natural state now... <break time="2s"/>

And as you continue to breathe naturally and easily, let's visit your future... <break time="1s"/> Imagine yourself tomorrow... <break time="1s"/> waking up with this same sense of natural confidence... <break time="1s"/> Your body feeling relaxed and strong... <break time="1s"/> moving through your day as your authentic self... <break time="1s"/> no longer negotiating with the past... <break time="1s"/> simply being... <break time="2s"/>

See yourself in conversations... <break time="1s"/> speaking your truth easily... <break time="1s"/> your voice clear and confident... <break time="1s"/> your body relaxed and present... <break time="1s"/> Notice how others respond to this authentic version of you... <break time="1s"/> drawn to your natural confidence... <break time="1s"/> your genuine presence... <break time="2s"/>

Watch yourself making decisions from this place of knowing who you are... <break time="1s"/> decisions that align with your truth... <break time="1s"/> choices that feel right in your body... <break time="1s"/> no tension... <break time="1s"/> no negotiation... <break time="1s"/> just the clarity that comes from living your full identity and self... <break time="3s"/>

See yourself six months from now... <break time="1s"/> looking back at this moment as the turning point... <break time="1s"/> when you fully stepped into who you are... <break time="1s"/> Your life flowing with the ease of someone who no longer fights against themselves... <break time="1s"/> Your body relaxed... <break time="1s"/> your heart open... <break time="1s"/> your spirit free... <break time="2s"/>

And a year from now... <break time="1s"/> living so naturally as your authentic self... <break time="1s"/> that you can barely remember what that tension used to feel like... <break time="1s"/> because this confidence... <break time="1s"/> this freedom... <break time="1s"/> this way of being... <break time="1s"/> has become as natural as breathing... <break time="3s"/>

Your unconscious mind is integrating all of these learnings now... <break time="1s"/> creating new neural pathways of confidence and authenticity... <break time="1s"/> releasing old patterns of tension and negotiation... <break time="1s"/> installing this natural way of being as your default state... <break time="2s"/>

Every time you take a deep breath and relax your shoulders... <break time="1s"/> you'll remember who you truly are... <break time="1s"/> Every time you feel your chest expand... <break time="1s"/> you'll connect with this confidence... <break time="1s"/> This is who you are now... <break time="1s"/> This is how you live... <break time="2s"/>

In a moment, I'll count from one to five... <break time="1s"/> and as I do, you'll begin to return to full waking consciousness... <break time="1s"/> bringing with you all of these positive changes... <break time="1s"/> feeling refreshed, confident, and completely aligned with who you truly are... <break time="2s"/>

One... beginning to return now... <break time="1s"/> feeling energy returning to your body... <break time="1s"/> Two... becoming more aware of your surroundings... <break time="1s"/> your confidence growing stronger... <break time="1s"/> Three... halfway back now... <break time="1s"/> feeling wonderful and refreshed... <break time="1s"/> Four... almost fully alert... <break time="1s"/> ready to live as your authentic self... <break time="1s"/> And Five... eyes open if they were closed, fully alert, fully present, and fully confident in who you are... <break time="2s"/>

Welcome back to your authentic, confident self...
